title: The Structure of a Lexical Resource in NLP
description: A diagram illustrating the key components of a lexical resource and their relationships, showing how they form a structured knowledge base for language processing.
relationships: A Lexical Entry is the central node
Morphological, Syntactic, and Semantic Information are properties of the Lexical Entry
Relationships form a network connecting multiple Lexical Entries
Corpus Examples provide contextual evidence for the information
